goal: Harden the card-art pipeline after the physical backfill by adding an automated showcase-card asset audit and documenting the current fallback/backfill baseline.
constraints: Do not undo the current physical card-art files.
Keep runtime behavior compatible with the existing asset resolution rules in src/utils/assets.ts.
Prefer lightweight automation and documentation over speculative visual redesign.
deliverables: An automated script that audits showcase card art presence on disk.
A package script or equivalent entry point to run the audit easily.
A short documentation update capturing the new verification baseline.
